name: Barbecue Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lean ground meat, bread crumbs, chopped onion, tomato sauce (8 oz), egg, My Seasoning, and green pepper in a large bowl. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
2. Place the mixture in a greased loaf pan.
3. In a separate saucepan, combine the water, vinegar, brown sugar, prepared mustard, additional tomato sauce, and butter. Heat over low heat until the butter melts completely.
4. Pour the barbecue sauce mixture evenly over the meatloaf.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. During baking, spoon additional sauce over the meatloaf occasionally to keep it moist.
6. Use a pan large enough to accommodate both the meat and sauce to prevent boiling over during cooking.
My Seasoning: Mix equal parts garlic powder, onion powder, and half black pepper. Combine well before adding to the recipe.
